info.title: EvoFlow API Gateway
info.description:
## EvoFlow API Gateway

API Gateway for EvoFlow - A LangGraph-based AI agent backend with sandbox execution capabilities.

### Features

- **Models Management**: Query and retrieve available AI models
- **MCP Configuration**: Manage Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations
- **Memory Management**: Access and manage global memory data for personalized conversations
- **Skills Management**: Query and manage skills and their enabled status
- **Artifacts**: Access thread artifacts and generated files
- **Health Monitoring**: System health check endpoints

### Architecture

LangGraph requests are handled by nginx reverse proxy.
This gateway provides custom endpoints for models, MCP configuration, skills, and artifacts.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available AI models configured in the system.

post.description: Add a new AI model to the configuration.

get.description: Get the current primary (default) model name.

schema.title: Response Get Primary Model Api Models Primary Get

post.description: Set a model as the primary (default) model by setting the primary_model field in config.

schema.title: Response Set Primary Model Api Models Primary Post

post.description: Run one chat completion using EvoFlow config (config.yaml), same as the main agent stack.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific AI model by its name.

put.description: Update an existing AI model configuration.

delete.description: Remove an AI model from the configuration.

schema.title: Response Delete Model Api Models  Model Name  Delete

post.description: Test connectivity to a model by sending a simple request.

schema.title: Response Test Model Connection Api Models Test Post

get.description: Retrieve the current Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations.

put.description: Update Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations and save to file.

get.description: List global memory plus each agent directory that has config and/or memory.json.
Retrieve memory data for the global store or a specific agent (agents/{id}/memory.json).

schema.description: Agent id; omit for global memory

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available skills from both public and custom directories.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific skill by its name.

put.description: Update a skill's enabled status by modifying the extensions_config.json file.

delete.description: Permanently delete a **custom** skill by removing its directory under ``skills/custom/``. Built-in **public** skills cannot be deleted. The skill entry is removed from ``extensions_config.json`` when present.

post.description: Install a skill from a .skill file (ZIP archive) located in the thread's user-data directory.
Download a .skill archive by slug from the public ClawHub CDN and install it into custom skills.

get.description: Retrieve an artifact file generated by the AI agent. Text and binary files can be viewed inline, while active web content is always downloaded.

post.description: Upload multiple files to a thread's uploads directory.

get.description: List all files in a thread's uploads directory.

schema.title: Response List Uploaded Files Api Threads  Thread Id  Uploads List Get

delete.description: Delete a file from a thread's uploads directory.

schema.title: Response Delete Uploaded File Api Threads  Thread Id  Uploads  Filename  Delete

delete.description:
Delete local persisted filesystem data for a thread.

This endpoint only cleans EvoFlow-managed thread directories. LangGraph
thread state deletion remains handled by the LangGraph API.

post.description:
Resolve and validate a local workspace path (frontend-selected directory).

- Normalizes user input (expands env vars and ~).
- Resolves to an absolute path where possible.
- Returns existence and directory flags for UI validation.

get.description: List thread-bound workspace directories managed by EvoFlow.
List all custom agents available in the agents directory, including the main agent.

post.description: Create a new custom agent with its config and SOUL.md.

get.description: Validate an agent name and check if it is available (case-insensitive).

schema.title: Response Check Agent Name Api Agents Check Get

get.description: Retrieve details and SOUL.md content for a specific custom agent. Use 'main' for the default agent.

put.description: Update an existing custom agent's config and/or SOUL.md. Use 'main' for the default agent.

delete.description: Delete a custom agent and all its files (config, SOUL.md, memory).

get.description: Read the global USER.md file that is injected into all custom agents.

put.description: Write the global USER.md file that is injected into all custom agents.

get.description: Return lists of available builtin tools, MCP servers, and skills for agent configuration UI.

post.description: Generate short follow-up questions a user might ask next, based on recent conversation context.

get.description: Get the status of all IM channels.

post.description: Restart a specific IM channel.
Enable or disable a specific IM channel.

get.description: Get the configuration of a specific IM channel.

put.description: Update the configuration of a specific IM channel.

post.description:
Send a proactive Feishu message (markdown card). Intended for cron or other schedulers.

Configure ``channels.feishu.push_secret`` in ``config.yaml`` or set ``EVOFLOW_FEISHU_PUSH_SECRET``.
Send the same value in header ``X-EvoFlow-Feishu-Push-Secret`` or ``Authorization: Bearer <secret>``.
Requires the Feishu channel to be enabled and running (Gateway started with channel service).

Begin Feishu QR registration. Returns a QR URL to scan with the Feishu app.

After scanning and authorizing in the Feishu app, poll the ``/poll`` endpoint
until ``status == "completed"``, then call ``/apply`` to save credentials
and start the channel automatically.

get.description:
Poll Feishu registration status.

Call this every 2-3 seconds after ``/begin``.  When ``status == "completed"``,
the response contains ``app_id`` and ``app_secret``.

post.description:
Apply Feishu registration credentials.

Saves ``app_id`` / ``app_secret`` to ``config.yaml`` and automatically starts
(or restarts) the Feishu channel.  Intended to be called after ``/poll``
returns ``status == "completed"``.
Begin Weixin (personal WeChat) iLink QR login. Returns ``qr_url`` to render as a QR image.

get.description: Poll Weixin iLink QR status (call every ~2s after ``/begin``).

post.description: Save Weixin credentials to disk and ``config.yaml``, then start or restart the channel.

get.description: Return whether backend cron is enabled and last tick diagnostics (for EvoPanel / curl).

schema.title: Response Automation Scheduler Status Api Automation Scheduler Status Get

post.description: EvoPanel «启动调度» — reports task counts and live Gateway scheduler snapshot (same idea as dev-api ``automation_start``).

schema.title: Response Automation Scheduler Client Start Api Automation Scheduler Start Post

post.description: EvoPanel «停止调度» — state only (backend loop is env-controlled); matches dev-api.

schema.title: Response Automation Scheduler Client Stop Api Automation Scheduler Stop Post

Response Automation Task Pause Api Automation Tasks  Task Id  Pause Post
Response Automation Task Resume Api Automation Tasks  Task Id  Resume Post

post.description:
Run one automation immediately (same pipeline as cron: Feishu + optional LangGraph).

Does not require ``status=active`` (for EvoPanel「手动运行」). Requires ChannelService running
for Feishu push / LangGraph-triggered notifications.

parameters.name: run_async

schema.description: If true, start the run after responding (same work as sync; use to avoid long HTTP hold).

get.description: SSE stream keyed by root/main task id (same id used in supervisor create_task).
返回流状态信息，供前端决定如何显示（历史回放/实时订阅）

schema.title: Response Get Thread Stream Status Api Events Threads  Thread Id  Stream Status Get

get.description: 返回任务流数据的诊断信息，包括文件存储和内存广播状态

schema.title: Response Get Stream Diagnostics Api Events Tasks  Task Id  Stream Diagnostics Get

get.summary: SSE: stream task progress snapshots for a thread
get.description:
Stream task/subtask progress for a thread, independent of chat run lifetime.

This endpoint exists to solve: lead-agent run ends early but subtasks still run in background,
so the UI must keep receiving progress/memory/error updates.
Debug endpoint: return persisted task stream snapshots for a task_id.
Return persisted stream history lines for one subtask.

List all runs with optional status filtering.

Args:
    status: Filter by status (pending, running, success, failed)
    limit: Maximum number of runs to return

Returns:
    List of runs with their status and metadata

post.description:
Cancel all pending and running runs.

This is useful for cleaning up stuck runs or when switching sessions.

Returns:
    Status message and count of cancelled runs

schema.title: Response Cancel All Runs Api Langgraph Runs Cancel Post

get.description: Search conversation sessions using GET method with query parameters.

post.description: Search conversation sessions using full-text search (FTS5). Supports filtering by assistant, date range, and content type.
Rebuild the FTS5 search index from scratch. Use this after bulk data changes.

schema.title: Response Rebuild Search Index Api Sessions Rebuild Index Post

get.description: Get statistics about indexed sessions.

schema.title: Response Get Session Stats Api Sessions Stats Get

get.summary: Attach to an in-progress run stream (refresh continuation)
get.description:
刷新续挂：为已有 run 提供 GET 续流入口。

输出 LangGraph 兼容 SSE：
- `event: values` + thread state snapshot（shape 与 /runs/stream values 一致/兼容）
- `event: end`：检测到 run 终态后关闭（best-effort）

get.summary: 获取正在执行中的会话列表
get.description:
获取当前正在执行中的会话列表。

通过 LangGraph POST /threads/search 获取所有线程,然后检查每个线程的 runs 状态,
返回状态为 pending 或 running 的会话。直接从 thread metadata 中获取 session_key,
避免前端需要维护 sessionKey ↔ threadId 映射。

put.description: Persist paths.base_dir to config.yaml and reload config in-process.

schema.title: Response Update Paths Api Runtime Paths Put

get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns:
    Service health status information.
